description: CompositionWhite and mauve printed top made of flowy chiffon blend fabric, has a white satin lining and a halter neck with a tie up detail at the sideFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycleDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or lay flat to dryMedium heat steam iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry in sunlightThe flounciest item stocked at myntra so far, this piece with its balloon referenced silhouette and mauve print adds a dollop of adorableness to this dainty lady-like top. A denim skirt of denim jeans with this top and your little lady is ready to show off her fashion sense to the world!
